field.name: clearvo_tax_code_auto
field.help: The EN16931 tax category Clearvo will use for this tax, based on its rate and fiscal tags. No action needed unless this is wrong.

field.name: clearvo_tax_code
field.placeholder: Leave blank to use auto-detected code above
field.help: Only set this if the auto-detected code above is incorrect for your specific tax treatment. Leave blank in most cases.

xpath.div: Clearvo automatically maps your tax rate and fiscal position tags to the correct EN16931 code. Set an override only if needed.
